channel.title: Infrastructure on Saurabh's personal site
channel.description: Recent content in Infrastructure on Saurabh's personal site

item.title: Web3’s Real Attack Surface: Beyond Smart Contracts
item.description:
Earlier today, a malicious actor gained unauthorized access to Drift Protocol through a novel attack involving durable nonces, resulting in a rapid takeover of Drift’s Security Council administrative powers.

This was a highly sophisticated operation that appears to have involved…

— Drift (@DriftProtocol) April 2, 2026

This notice is issued on behalf of Resolv Digital Assets Ltd. in relation to the Resolv protocol.

Earlier today, a malicious actor gained unauthorized access to Resolv infrastructure through compromised private key, resulting in the minting of approximately $80M of…
